title: Bridge Essay: Technologically-assisted communication attenuates inter-brain synchrony.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ritual** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Neural synchrony — interpersonal brain-to-brain coupling, hyperscanning, joint music-making, collective entrainment.

**Technologically-assisted communication attenuates inter-brain synchrony.**. Neuroimage.. PMID: 36244598. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroimage.2022.119677. The transition to technologically-assisted communication has permeated all facets of human social life; yet, its impact on the social brain is still unknown and the effects may be particularly intense during periods of developmental transitions.
